data.title: Fusen Pharmaceutical’s New Hypertension Drug Gains Approval in China
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Fusen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. ( (HK:1652) ) has provided an update.

Fusen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. announced that its subsidiary, Jiaheng Pharmaceutical Technology, has received approval from the National Medical Products Administration of the PRC to market ‘Measartan Potassium Tablets’ for treating primary hypertension. This product, containing azilsartan medoxomil potassium, enhances the company’s portfolio in the blood circulatory system field, offering a new treatment option for hypertension with significant and stable effects, and aligns with the company’s strategy to strengthen its market position in the antihypertensive drug sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1652) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fusen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. stock, see the HK:1652 Stock Forecast page.

More about Fusen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.

Fusen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, focusing on the pharmaceutical industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, develops and markets medical products, with a particular emphasis on treatments for the blood circulatory system.

Average Trading Volume: 2,542,245

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$602.9M

data.title: PegBio Co., Ltd. Receives Approval for Innovative Diabetes Drug PB-119
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

PegBio Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2565) ) just unveiled an announcement.

PegBio Co., Ltd. announced that the China National Medical Products Administration has approved the new drug application for PB-119, a long-acting GLP-1 receptor agonist. This approval marks a significant milestone for PegBio, as PB-119 offers comprehensive management of type 2 diabetes by improving blood glucose control, blood pressure, blood lipids, and weight. The drug’s unique molecular structure and innovative PEGylation technology enhance its efficacy and safety profile, potentially strengthening PegBio’s position in the pharmaceutical industry.

More about PegBio Co., Ltd. Class H

PegBio Co., Ltd. is a pharmaceutical company based in China, focusing on the development of innovative drugs. Their primary product, PB-119, is a glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonist aimed at treating type 2 diabetes mellitus.

Shanghai Henlius Biotech, Inc. Class H ( (HK:2696) ) has shared an update.

Shanghai Henlius Biotech, Inc. has announced that its biosimilar product, HLX11 (pertuzumab-dpzb), branded as POHERDY® in the United States, has received FDA approval for use in treating HER2-positive early and metastatic breast cancer.
